message:
feat(polyfills): add UDP sockets, fs.watch, stream backpressure, socket buffer options

- Add native UDP socket support (SOCK_DGRAM) with multicast
- Add fs.watch/watchFile using kqueue (macOS) / inotify (Linux)
- Enforce stream highWaterMark for proper backpressure
- Add TCP socket buffer options (SO_RCVBUF, SO_SNDBUF, SO_LINGER)
- Improve dgram.js to use native UDP functions
- Add HTTP upgrade event detection for WebSocket
